---
title: "Snapshots"
output: html_document
---

# Libraries

```{r}

# Libraries
library(terra)
library(tidyverse)
library(tidyterra)
library(ggspatial)

```

# Global Variables
```{r}

# Global Colors and Labels (IGBP Classes)
master_colors <- c(
  "1"  = "#05450a", 
  "2"  = "#086a10", 
  "3"  = "#54a008", 
  "4"  = "#78d203", 
  "5"  = "#009900", 
  "6"  = "#05450a", 
  "7"  = "#d68d24", 
  "8"  = "#b3a334", 
  "9"  = "#a6d96a",
  "10" = "#1a9850", 
  "11" = "#27ff87", 
  "12" = "#c24f44", 
  "13" = "#a5a5a5", 
  "14" = "#ff6d4c", 
  "15" = "#69fff8", 
  "16" = "#f5deb3", 
  "17" = "#A6CEE3", 
  "0"  = "#A6CEE3", 
  "255"= "#ffffff"
)

master_labels <- c(
  "1"  = "Evergreen Needleleaf Forest",
  "2"  = "Evergreen Broadleaf Forest",
  "3"  = "Deciduous Needleleaf Forest",
  "4"  = "Deciduous Broadleaf Forest",
  "5"  = "Mixed Forest",
  "6"  = "Closed Shrublands",
  "7"  = "Open Shrublands",
  "8"  = "Woody Savannas",
  "9"  = "Savannas",
  "10" = "Grasslands",
  "11" = "Permanent Wetlands",
  "12" = "Croplands",
  "13" = "Urban and Built-up",
  "14" = "Cropland/Natural Mosaic",
  "15" = "Permanent Snow and Ice",
  "16" = "Barren",
  "17" = "Water Bodies",
  "0"  = "Water Bodies",
  "255"= "Unclassified"
)

```

# Folder Creation

```{r}

# Create folder to hold snapshots
dir.create("Images/Snapshots", recursive = TRUE, showWarnings = FALSE)

```

# Generate Snapshots

```{r}

# Define dates and regions
years <- c("2001", "2007", "2024")
regions <- c("Senegal", "Chad")
month <- "08" # August (Peak of rainy season)

```

```{r}

# Snapshot function
generate_snapshot <- function(region, year, month) {
  
  # Set the MODIS tile based on the region
  tile <- ifelse(region == "Senegal", "h16", "h19")
  
  # Define the paths to files
  files <- list(
    NDVI = file.path("Data", region, "Vegetation", "NDVI", paste0("NDVI.", tile, ".", year, ".", month, ".tif")),
    EVI = file.path("Data", region, "Vegetation", "EVI", paste0("EVI.", tile, ".", year, ".", month, ".tif")),
    Day_Temp = file.path("Data", region, "Temperature", "Day", paste0("Day.", tile, ".", year, ".", month, ".tif")),
    Night_Temp = file.path("Data", region, "Temperature", "Night", paste0("Night.", tile, ".", year, ".", month, ".tif")),
    Land_Cover = file.path("Data", region, "LandCover", paste0("LC.", tile, ".", year, ".tif")) # No month for LC
  )
  
  # Loop through each variable and generate a plot
  for (var_name in names(files)) {
    file_path <- files[[var_name]]
    
    # Skip if the file doesn't exist yet
    if (!file.exists(file_path)) {
      message(paste("File missing, skipping:", file_path))
      next
    }
    
    r <- rast(file_path)
    p <- ggplot()
    
    # Custom plotting logic based on the variable type
    if (var_name %in% c("NDVI", "EVI")) {
      p <- p + geom_spatraster(data = r) +
        scale_fill_viridis_c(option = "viridis", name = var_name, na.value = "transparent") +
        labs(title = paste(var_name, "-", region), subtitle = paste("August", year)) +
        theme_bw() + 
        scale_x_continuous(expand = c(0, 0)) +
        scale_y_continuous(expand = c(0, 0))
      
    } else if (var_name %in% c("Day_Temp", "Night_Temp")) {
      # Convert Kelvin to Celsius for the plot
      r_celsius <- r - 273.15
      p <- p + geom_spatraster(data = r_celsius) +
        scale_fill_viridis_c(option = "magma", name = "Temp (°C)", na.value = "transparent") +
        labs(title = paste(str_replace(var_name, "_", " "), "-", region), subtitle = paste("August", year)) +
        theme_bw() + 
        scale_x_continuous(expand = c(0, 0)) +
        scale_y_continuous(expand = c(0, 0))
      
    } else if (var_name == "Land_Cover") {
      # Ensure the data is treated as categorical
      r_factor <- as.factor(r)
      
      p <- p + geom_spatraster(data = r_factor) +
        scale_fill_manual(
          values = master_colors,
          labels = master_labels,
          name = "Land Cover Class",
          na.translate = FALSE # Hides "NA" from clogging up your legend
        ) +
        
        labs(title = paste("Land Cover -", region), subtitle = paste("Year", year)) +
        theme_bw() + 
        scale_x_continuous(expand = c(0, 0)) +
        scale_y_continuous(expand = c(0, 0))
    }
    
    p <- p +
      annotation_scale(location = "bl", width_hint = 0.3) + 
      annotation_north_arrow(location = "tr", which_north = "true") +
      theme(
        axis.title = element_blank(),
        axis.text  = element_blank(),
        axis.ticks = element_blank(),
      )
    
    # Save the plot as a PNG image
    output_filename <- file.path("Images/Snapshots", paste0(region, "_", var_name, "_", year, ".png"))
    ggsave(output_filename, plot = p, width = 8, height = 6, dpi = 300, bg = "white")
    
    print(paste("Saved snapshot:", output_filename))
  }
}

```

```{r}

# Run loop for snapshots 2001, 2007, 2025
for (region in regions) {
  for (year in years) {
    generate_snapshot(region, year, month)
  }
}

print("All snapshots generated successfully!")

```
